channel.title: Jaime M. Mena — Blog
channel.description: Revenue Operations, B2B SaaS GTM, and bilingual operations posts by Jaime M. Mena.

item.title: MEDDPICC vs MEDDIC: which framework actually moves forecast accuracy
item.description: A direct comparison of MEDDPICC and MEDDIC from someone who has implemented both in B2B SaaS. The honest answer about which one lifts forecast accuracy — and why the framework matters less than the discipline behind it.

item.title: Salesforce vs HubSpot for a 20-rep sales team: an honest comparison
item.description: A direct comparison of Salesforce and HubSpot for B2B SaaS teams at the 20-rep inflection point. Real trade-offs across time-to-value, customization, cost, and ecosystem — written from operator experience.

item.title: The cross-border RevOps playbook: USD revenue, MXN operations, one comp plan
item.description: A practical playbook for running Revenue Operations across the US-Mexico border: comp plans that handle USD and MXN, forecasting across time zones, Salesforce currency setup, and the common mistakes that cost teams real money.
